Job Title: NLP / LLM Engineer
Company: Cognito Labs
Location: Remote (US-based)

About the Role:
Cognito Labs builds enterprise AI assistants powered by large language models. 
We're seeking an NLP/LLM Engineer to build and improve our core language AI systems.
